entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Once the game started the app crashed. Game: Call of Duty Black Ops

entries.author: supermariofan3720
entries.excerpt: FMV sequences are loud, menu constantly interrupts asking for a save storage until you select New Game, and use the old XMA Decoder to get past the blue flash at launch.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: After restarting the game several times the game finally launched and put me in the menu. I couldn’t get into a game tho so I couldn’t actually skate just the menu worked. And also most of the time the game was stuck on a endless loading screen when trying to get to the game menu

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Get stuck on the left for dead screen before the menu.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Runs and can play the campaign, a few minor graphical glitches and drops in FPS

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Relatively playable on iPhone 17, 15-25 fps most of the time.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Playable, a few minor FPS drops intermittently, minor graphical glitches that functionally still manage to fit the aesthetic of the game.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Couldn’t get it to boot.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Gets into game without issue, relatively steady frame rate, 20-25fps.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Game Boots but can’t load the First Level it seems.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Runs at about 20fps, but seems like the engine expects 30fps consistently so not very playable currently.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Does not boot, no visible attempt.

entries.author: daisuke1227
entries.excerpt: try relaunching a couple of times and see if that fixes it

entries.author: randomname2077
entries.excerpt: the game just insta crashes no matter what you do. this appears to be an issue that extends to iOS/iPadOS 17 at large, not particularly tied to this specific game.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Unusable but it boots and intro works.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Playable, some graphical issues.

entries.author: daisuke1227
entries.excerpt: So basically this took a couple of launches for it to even get past the title screen and it's at 30FPS when launching the game it doesn't render it correctly and it's just a green mess of whatever and sometimes even in game it just doesn't render things correctly (shown in the video) and performance doesn't change even when not recording

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Audio is ok, everything works great but some corruptions in game.

entries.author: xenios-jp

entries.author: AloneAgainstWorld
entries.excerpt: The game launches but crashes when you start a game.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Black screen and didn’t load even into menu

entries.author: J7mbo
J7mbo
entries.excerpt: And... textures are messed up in classic.

entries.author: J7mbo
entries.excerpt: Additionally even in classic mode, the characters for subtitles are completely scrambled.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt:
If loading into game with classic graphics, runs at a steady 30fps. In anniversary mode there are severe graphical issues. When switching back from anniversary to classic mid game this breaks rendering in classic. 

Additionally, the game shows audio issues in the warthog and some covenant vehicles.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Game runs at 15-20fps on iPhone 17. No noticeable graphical issues. Runs in slow motion due to engine expecting 60fps.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Runs around 10-15fps on iPhone 17. Has severe audio issues. Graphically looks perfect in the first mission at least.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Severe graphical issues rendering the game unplayable. Performance also extremely poor.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Loads into firefight but extreme graphical issues to the point that the game is unplayable.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: When the game finishes launching past the Developer credits and the intro movie starts the visuals of the movie have a Matrix-effect, when you hear the audio start Press Start or A to get to the main start menu. The audio effects and music in the game play well. Some in game graphics have a rainbow psychedelic coloration effect over them, it seems to occur when a transparent filter is applied over the in game characters and objects, such as looking through a window or when the in game lighting is in day time. The Game plays slower than the original speed but is still very playable.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Requires Dedicated XMA core

entries.author: xenios-jp

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Crashes

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Game boots and loads quickly and smoothly with some graphical glitches during cutscenes. This game has experienced a regression from previous version and now freezes at varying points after loading the menu where as I was able to get into and play the game at about 3/4 speed on initial version.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Boots quickly and smoothly but hangs on initial loading screen past logos.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: The game flashes a quick random color pattern and fails to load or boot.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Starts up, publisher logos display gets to Start menu. But when press Start does not proceed further

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Had to boot the game a few times in order for it to work. Other than that the game is playable but the performance is quite poor (around 25 fps without screen recording and 22-23 with screen recording)

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt:
-Graphics: minor glitches like hair transparency 
-Performance: full speed on higher end devices with minor dips.
-Sound: No sound…
-Menus: Perfect 
-Videos: work

*Tested for an hour with no crash

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Perfect. Full speed on higher end devices.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Game loads with no glitches I could tell. The game runs smoothly but with slightly reduced speed. Very playable and very enjoyable!

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Visuals are perfect with no apparent glitches. Performance is half speed but stutter free. Menus are perfect and sound is perfect.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Virtua Fighter 5 works almost perfectly. Performance is nice. Visuals are almost perfect. Sound is great. Menus are perfect.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Game does not boot.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Doom 3 boots perfectly through logos and menu with no visual distortion and perfect audio except for loud hiss at the beginning. When beginning campaign cutscene plays perfects but hangs after maybe 20 seconds or so.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Game boots and loads to menu flawlessly. Heavy graphic distortion during unskippable cutscene leads to app crash after several minutes.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Game boots and loads into menu without issue but hangs on initial loading screen

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Star ocean fails to boot.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: RE5 currently fails to boot

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Gets into the main menu but hangs when starting game.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Seems totally playable from my testing, very low spec requirements to run.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: The intro has some graphical issues and the game crashes after the intro

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Just played around with some settings and the game seems to boot now. Performance is poor and there are some minor graphical glitches but you can get into a match now

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Game has got some graphical issues. I couldn’t get past the cutscene but even the cutscene had some graphical issues

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Game boots however menu loads very distorted with heavy graphic bugs. Campaign loads intro scene but gets stuck in a loop. Could not navigate menu successfully to bypass loop.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Gets into firefight, campaign does not load the first cutscene. Can expect the same cutscene loop as Halo 3 if it does manage to load.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Occasional drops in FPS but very much playable.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: It will be playable when you guys see this you get 28 fps but it feels like 30 there are black rectangles the first two boots up but is playable i know from playing for a hour

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: First and second time You’ll see a black rectangle you’re running a third time that goes away per make sure you run the game for a minute and play it loaded up the shader cast

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Loads into game but experiences severe graphical issues.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Playable in game with ok-ish framerate on M4 Pro, significant occlusion issues

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Runs well but with pretty severe intermittent graphical issues.

entries.author: xenios-jp
entries.excerpt: Get's into game with severe graphical issues. Framerate is above 30 on M4 Pro.
